title: Marathrum montanum

This genus is a part of the order Haloragales and the class Magnoliopsida. The class Magnoliopsida is a subgroup of the larger group called Angiosperms, which are flowering plants. The classification of Marathrum montanum reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history.
